title: Niiwin #DataBack Day
content:
On February 20, 2026, Local Contexts team members presented as a part of #DataBack Day, an online convening hosted by Niiwin, the community-focused data platform built by Animikii Indigenous Technology, and Wabusk Data Solutions.

Local Contexts Strategic Advisor and Co-Founder Jane Anderson, Executive Director Hop Hopkins, and Director of Programs Corrie Roe shared about the Traditional Knowledge and Biocultural Labels as a practical tool towards #DataBack.

creator: Local Contexts
